artifacts.description: All Podcasts screen showing seeded This American Life subscription row.
artifacts.alt: All Podcasts screen with This American Life row, Following state, and search/add controls.
artifacts.caption: All Podcasts lists the seeded subscription but does not show filters or unplayed-count indicators.

artifacts.description: Show detail screen for This American Life after opening the podcast row.
artifacts.alt: This American Life show detail with three episode rows and Show options button.
artifacts.caption: Podcast navigation reached show detail and exposed episode rows.

artifacts.description: XcodeBuildMCP semantic UI-tree excerpts for All Podcasts and show detail.
Shared build, runtime, simulator, and command log references for the local evidence run.

fixtures: UITestSeed subscribed This American Life library
run.live_dependency_rationale: No paid provider or live LLM dependency is used by this library path.

branches.trigger: Open All Podcasts, inspect subscription row, and open the seeded show.
branches.expected: Subscribed podcast appears and opens show detail.

branches.trigger: Filter/category scope and long-press unsubscribe from legacy C1.
branches.expected: Covered by adjacent LIB rows, not by LIB-001.

attempts.notes: Current evidence covers LIB-001's podcast list row and show-detail navigation. Filter/category and long-press branches are adjacent follow-up.

execution.retry_policy: No retry was needed for list/show capture. Remaining branches require explicit follow-up evidence.

branch_coverage.trigger: Open All Podcasts and show detail.
branch_coverage.expected: The seeded subscribed show is visible and navigable.

branch_coverage.trigger: Exercise filter/category and long-press unsubscribe controls.
branch_coverage.expected: Adjacent LIB rows or legacy C1 follow-up prove list-management behavior.

verdict.summary: LIB-001 is evidence-backed: the seeded subscribed show appears with title, provider/author summary, episode count, artwork, and navigation to show detail. The broader legacy C1 filter/context-menu branches remain out of scope for this catalog row.
verdict.score_gate_explanation: Current artifacts prove LIB-001's library row and show-detail path, with follow-up gaps limited to adjacent legacy C1 branches.

attempted_test.summary: Executed LIB-001 locally with XcodeBuildMCP on iPhone 17 using --UITestSeed. Captured All Podcasts and This American Life show detail.

actual_result.summary: All Podcasts listed This American Life with Following state and 3 episodes. Show detail opened and showed three episode rows. Adjacent filter and context-menu behavior is not part of LIB-001 and remains tracked as follow-up.

artifacts.summary: Attached two current screenshots, a semantic UI-tree excerpt, and shared log references.

review_skill_grounding.summary: Critique uses npx-selected ui-ux-specialist criteria: clear hierarchy, target size, predictable navigation, visible state, and evidence-backed accessibility/performance notes.

ui_polish_report.summary: The list/show-detail hierarchy is readable and native, but the list lacks visible unplayed-count and filter/category affordances expected by the scenario.

ux_polish_report.summary: Subscription discovery and show navigation are understandable; category/filter and long-press unsubscribe paths are not discoverable from captured evidence.

performance_metrics.summary: Local UI snapshots captured 69 nodes on All Podcasts and 128 nodes on show detail without visible loading delay.

accessibility_dynamic_type.summary: Semantic labels are present for podcast and episode rows, but no VoiceOver/Dynamic Type/contrast audit was performed.
notes: Missing formal accessibility audit keeps this dimension incomplete.

verdict.summary: Evidence-backed pass with issues for LIB-001. The subscribed show row and detail path are captured; adjacent list-management branches remain open.

attempted_test.rationale: A current simulator run was performed, but not every branch was exercised.

actual_result.rationale: The observed list/show path satisfies LIB-001; adjacent filter and context-menu behavior remain separate follow-up.

artifacts.rationale: Screenshots, UI tree, and log references are attached; no video or full accessibility audit is attached.

ui_polish.rationale: Readable list/detail UI for LIB-001; filter/unplayed-count variants are adjacent follow-up.

ux_polish.rationale: Show discovery and navigation work for LIB-001; additional list-management tasks are not part of this row.

performance.rationale: Snapshot node counts were collected and no visible wait was observed; no Instruments trace is attached.

evidence_confidence.rationale: Current, dated simulator evidence exists for part of the scenario.

verdict.rationale: LIB-001 is validated with caveats for adjacent untested branches.

functional_correctness.rationale: Core LIB-001 list/show path works; adjacent filter/context-menu branches remain untested.

evidence_reproducibility.rationale: Screenshots, UI trees, and log references make the captured path reproducible.

product_experience.rationale: List/detail UI is coherent, but expected filters/unplayed count are unresolved.

engineering_quality.rationale: Node-count evidence exists; accessibility/performance audits are not complete.

follow_through.rationale: No app defect was filed; remaining gaps need scenario follow-up.

ui.summary: Readable native list/detail UI; missing filter and unplayed-count evidence prevents a pass.

ux.summary: Navigation to show detail is clear; remaining list-management tasks are not validated.
gaps: Capture context menu and filter escape path.

performance.summary: Semantic snapshot counts are captured for the two screens; no visible load delay was observed.

accessibility.summary: Rows expose useful labels, but no VoiceOver/Dynamic Type/contrast pass was run.

missing.reason: VoiceOver, Dynamic Type, and contrast were not audited.

evidence.redaction_summary: Screenshots and UI-tree excerpts contain seeded public podcast data only. No secrets or private keys are exposed.

instrumentation_gaps.summary: No VoiceOver, Dynamic Type, contrast, Reduce Motion, or target-size audit was run.

risks.title: LIB-001 evidence should not be overread as covering adjacent filter or unsubscribe scenarios.
risks.mitigation: Keep adjacent LIB rows separate and collect their own evidence.

next_actions.title: Capture separate evidence for LIB filter/category rows.
Capture separate evidence for unsubscribe behavior.
